productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all black uppers with white  accents in an updated silhouette creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability and comfortSuede toe counter for more protection to the feetBuilt up collar design for great urban styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand logo embossed on the side, behind collar and on the tongueMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in textured pattern for maximum durability and tractionBuilt up textured heel counter for greater protection to the heelShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
